name: Du-Art Film Laboratories, Inc.
summary: Du-Art Film Laboratories, Inc. provides post production and media services to producers, distributors, Fortune 500 companies, and independent filmmakers. It offers 4K digital post production, audiobook production, audio production and mixing, language localization production, digital asset management, editing, finishing, equipment and suite rental, and other services. The company was founded in 1922 and is based in New York, New York.
